data.description:
Repro (verified on installed 0.4.0 == HEAD): rebar edit <id> --title="" -> exit 0, show .title == "". create enforces non-empty title; edit guards empty --description= (citing bug e78f-9f79) and empty --parent, but not --title.

Source: src/rebar/_engine/ticket-edit.sh — description guard :122-127, parent guard :156; no equivalent in the --title arm.

Fix: mirror the e78f-9f79 guard for --title. RED test: edit --title="" exits 1, title unchanged.
data.title: edit --title="" silently clobbers the title (same clobber class fixed for --description in e78f-9f79)
